result.vlm_summary:
<TRAJECTA_DATA_96aa307e>page_state:
Google Flights results page for Sydney → Los Angeles, one-way, 1 passenger, Economy, date Tue Mar 10. The “Cheapest” tab shows “from $350”; top flights list is visible.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“One way”, “1”, “Economy”, “Sydney”, “Los Angeles”, “Tue, Mar 10”, “Cheapest from $350”, “Top flights”, “Sorted by top flights”, “2:00 PM – 1:00 PM”, “17 hr”, “1 stop”, “$404”, “11:20 AM – 7:05 AM”, “Nonstop”, “$541”, “5:45 PM – 1:30 PM”, “Nonstop”, “$549”.
selected_candidate:
The $350 cheapest-price option/tab area near the top right of the results header.
constraint_evidence:
- One-way flight: supported (visible “One way” and URL/title context).
- Origin Sydney: supported (visible).
- Destination Los Angeles: supported (visible).
- Departure date March 10, 2026: supported (visible “Tue, Mar 10” and URL context).
- Lowest-priced flight: supported as a visible cheapest indicator (“Cheapest from $350”), but not yet confirmed selected/opened.
- Price target $350: supported by visible cheapest label; the clicked target was the SPAN with value “$350”.
- One-way vs round-trip: supported as one-way.
- Other qualifiers (airline, duration, stops, exact fare details for the $350 option): not_visible.
action_target:
Click the visible “$350” span in the Cheapest header.
success_signals:
Cheapest $350 element becomes selected/opened or the corresponding flight details/results update to the $350 option.
failure_signals:
Click lands on a different fare/result; no change in selection; </TRAJECTA_DATA_96aa307e>

evidence.claim: The trajectory reaches Google Flights results for the correct route and constraints: Sydney to Los Angeles, one-way, departing Tue, Mar 10.
The agent explicitly opened the sort menu and clicked the Price sort option, which is the correct mechanism to enforce the 'lowest-priced' constraint.

By the final step, the results page visibly shows 'Sorted by price' and the top visible fare is Fiji Airways at $350, supporting that the lowest-priced visible one-way option for the specified date is surfaced.
The trajectory ends on a relevant results page rather than an error or wrong target page; no hard constraint is visibly contradicted in the inspected steps.

suggested_followups.message: Inspect the $350 Fiji Airways result in more detail if you want the full stop and timing breakdown.
